commentaries.author: Cyril of Alexandria
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Ponder the path of your feet, and let all your ways be established. Cyril of Alexandria We remember holy Scripture crying out, “Make straight the path for your feet, and direct your ways. ” They who honor the straight paths “run toward the goal to the prize of the heavenly calling in Christ. ” But those who pay no heed to the apostolic and evangelical tradition and honor the newer, useless and truly ridiculous invention of their own mind, let them hear from all, “Pass not beyond the ancient bounds which your fathers have set.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Straight. Hebrew, "ponder. "Examine what thou takest in hand, and walk not at random, Hebrews xii. 13.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
